(vi) -zy.cm qm 3l\RiX, Tl -zy.cm ~ ~~i.,.'JTl1 3ih ~ ~-i)'il. fJR;n 3Rcl':, '\j"ffi' ~I (Iii) ->l'r ~ ~ ~ ~, Tl ~'1 316:;,(>1 ~ ~ mW, 77, 'ffil ,jqell "1i'i. ~~.~.~-10 I [11iI. ~ 11/3/ 2012-c:rcr:F] ~. tfT. fug, ~ ~ MINISTRY OF MINORITY AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi. the 12th April, 2013 S.O. 950(E}.-Whereas in accordance with the provisions contained in sub- section (1) of Section 4 of the Durgah Khawaja Saheb Act. 1955 (36 of 1955), the administration, control and management of the Durgah Endowment are vested in a Committee constituted for the purpose. 2. Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 5 and sub-section (I) of Section 6 of the said Act and in supersession of the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Minority Affairs' published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary. Part II. Section 3. Sub-section (ii), vide number S.O.I457(E). dated the 24th August. 2007, except as respects things done or omitted to be done before such supersession, the Central Government hereby appoints the following as members to the Durgah Committee, Ajmer, who are Hanafi Muslims, for a period of five years with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the OfficialGazette, namely :- v (i) Shri Asrar Ahmad lilian S/ 0 Late Shri Istiaque Ahmed Khan, Mohalla: Lalpura. Dungarpur. Rajasthan. ,/(ii) Shri Sheikh Alim S/o Shri Sheikh Habib, 177. Azad Nagar, Indore. Madhya Pradesh-45200 1. v(iii) Janab Maulana Abdul Wadood "Peer Ashraf", S/o Late Maulana Abdul Wahab. Madarsa Edara-e-Shariya U.P., Khinni Talla, Raebareli. Uttar Pradesh. Pin- 229001. ,/(iv) Shri Shah Ammar Ahmad Ahmadi, urf Nayyar Mian, Sajjadanashin Rudauli Sharif Dargah. Distt. Faizabad, Uttar Pradesh. Janab Chishty Ziauddin Khwaja Motnuddin Chishty S/o Shri Khwaja Moinuddin Chishty, Aiwan-E-Chist. Nasirbaug, Khwaja Nasiruddin Chishty Marg, Shahibaug, Ahmedabad, Gujarat- 380 004. Jv) \,1 -- 2 of 2 --
